summary: All three requirements are implemented in the diff. REQ-1 is addressed via a useEffect that auto-triggers iiLogin() when step becomes 'authenticate'. REQ-2 is addressed by watching isLoginError and resetting the auto-login ref/state so the user can retry. REQ-3 is addressed by a useEffect that navigates to '/' when step becomes 'success'. No missing requirements or hallucinated features were identified.
